name: In the top room of a tall watch tower
description:
You stand in the uppermost room of a stone watch tower.  The room is plain and
very small.  There is a window in the southern section of the wall that looks
out on the open ground around Dale--ground now covered by the beseiging army of
orcs and easterlings.  A large rug covers the stone floor below the window.  
Behind you, the floor opens onto the stairs that lead down.  The roof of the
tower is low above your head, conical in shape and made of rough wood.  A plain
chair sits against the wall.
